title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-07
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the greenhouse metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health statuses and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as gardeners, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse to represent the automated app health checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen displaying a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
